title: Censorship Accountability Act
stage_label: Read twice and referred to the Committee on the Judiciary.
subjects: Government employee pay, benefits, personnel management
crs_summary: Censorship Accountability Act This bill creates a new federal cause of action for the deprivation of any rights, privileges, or immunities secured by the First Amendment by a federal employee acting under color of any statute, ordinance, custom, or usage of the United States. The term federal employee means an individual, other than the President or Vice President, who occupies a position in the Executive Branch.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on the Judiciary.
